title: Choose a First Thread
description: Choose a first direction of attention so the guild can help turn a broad concern into one actionable local situation.
reward_description: A temporary guild badge proving that the bearer has chosen a first direction of attention and can take responsibility for a small local situation.

ja.title: 最初の糸口を選ぶ
ja.reward_description: 最初に関心を向ける方向を選び、小さな状況に責任を持って関わることを示す仮のギルド証。

title: Mistbound Frontier Survey
description: Permission to engage deeper instability beyond the stable lamps after the first local thread is established.
reward_description: Permission to take higher-risk requests beyond the stable lamps.

ja.title: 夜霧の辺境調査
ja.reward_description: 安定した灯りの外側で、より危険な調査や対応を引き受ける許可。
